action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current operational telemetry from the power grid including load, generation, battery levels, and frequency.

action_set_definitions.name: set_thermal_dispatch
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the target output for thermal power plants. Note: The system enforces a maximum change of 40 MW per interval relative to the current output.

target_mw.description: The desired thermal power output in Megawatts.

action_set_definitions.name: set_battery_dispatch
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the battery storage system to discharge (positive MW) or charge (negative MW). Ensure SOC remains above 150 MWh.

dispatch_mw.description: The amount of power to add to (positive) or remove from (negative) the grid in Megawatts.

action_set_definitions.name: set_load_shedding
action_set_definitions.description: Emergency tool to force a reduction in consumer demand (load shedding) to prevent frequency collapse when supply capacity is exhausted.

shed_mw.description: The amount of load to shed in Megawatts. Should be 0 during normal operations.

action_set_definitions.name: step_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation to the next dispatch interval. The world model updates state and calculates frequency based on the balance of supply, demand, and shedding.

state_description.grid_load_mw: The current total electricity demand from the consumer side in Megawatts.
state_description.thermal_gen_mw: Current power output from controllable thermal power plants (coal/gas) in Megawatts.
state_description.renewable_gen_mw: Current power output from non-controllable sources (solar/wind) in Megawatts.
state_description.battery_soc_mwh: Current energy stored in the grid-scale battery system in Megawatt-hours.
state_description.grid_frequency_hz: The system frequency, where 50.0 or 60.0 represents a perfect balance between supply and demand.
state_description.timestamp_hour: The current hour of the simulation cycle (0-23).
